headline: Joe Kent 💥👋 BAILS on Trump-Iran War Zionist Pressure 😤🇮🇱🚫
text:
Top Trump CT Czar Joe Kent 🦅🔥 SPECIAL FORCES STUD 💪🇺🇸 just YEETED 🚀 his resignation letter 📜💣 on X 🐦, SLAYING 👊 'Daddy Trump 🍊👨‍💼 started this Iran war 🔥🇮🇷 cuz Israel lobby 🤑🇮🇱 and AIPAC simps 🤡💰 twisted his arm!' No imminent threat 😴🛡️ to USA, bby – pure 'ECHO CHAMBER' LIES 🗣️🤥 from Mossad daddies 👀🕵️‍♂️ and journo cucks 📺😩 pushing Trump off 'America First' 🚀🇺🇸 like a bad Tinder swipe 👉🚫!

White House Karoline Leavitt 💅📢 ROASTS him: 'Compelling EVIDENCE 💥 Iran mullahs were boutta ATTACK FIRST 🥷🇮🇷!' ADL antisemite detectors 🕵️‍♂️🚨 screech 'OLD TROPE ALERT' 😱📢 blaming Jews n media for war – AIPAC reposts like 'YEP, KENT'S FINITO' 😂🔒. J Street libzions call it 'UGLY AF antisemitic SLIME' 🐌💦. Trump in Oval 💼🪑 calls Kent 'nice guy but WEAK SAUCE on security' 😴🛡️ – 'Good riddance, his letter made me REALIZE he's OUT' 🎉🚪!

Kent, 45yo GREEN BERET 🪖💀 CIA paramil HUNK 🕶️🔫 whose wifey Shannon 💔🚢 got BOOMED 😢💥 in Syria suicide blast 2019, drops TRUTH BOMBS 💣: 'Can't send NEXT GEN zoomers to DIE 🪦⚰️ in Zionist neocon WAR PORK 🐷🇮🇱 that AIN'T FOR 'MERICA!' Deployed 11x 🛫🌍, dad of two 👨‍👧‍👦 – now reporting to Tulsi Gabbard 🧘‍♀️🇺🇸 DNI MOMMY who BACKS Trump's Iran smackdown 👊🔥: 'Prez saw IMMINENT THREAT from ayatollah terrorists 🕌💣 and HIT 'EM HARD' 💥🚀!

Polly reacts WILD 🌀: Mitch McConnell 🧓🐌 'Isolationist antisemite LARPers GTFO gov' 🚫🤡! But MTG 🔥🍑 'Joe Kent AMERICAN HERO 🦸‍♂️🇺🇸 – DON'T BUY THE LIES' 📢🛡️! Ex-Proud Boys consultant vibes 👹🛡️ from his failed Congress runs 🏃‍♂️💨 (denied J6 feds & 2020 steal 🤫🗳️). Trump 2.0 turnover LOWKEY 📉 vs first term chaos 🤪 – but Kent's the BIGGEST DISSENTER YET on US-Israel Iran BBQ 🔥🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷!

Kent's letter SPILLS: High Israeli officials 🕵️‍♂️🇮🇱 + US journos sowed MISINFO 🌱🤥 to DECEIVE Trump into endless Mideast meat grinder 🥩🔥 – 'This was a LIE, bby!' 😤💔. WH laughs off 'foreign influence' claims 😂🤡: 'Trump's got the RECEIPTS on Iran first strike!' 📄💥. Meanwhile, neocons THRUSTING 🍆📈 for more war bucks 💰🤑 while Kent says 'NO MORE AMERICAN BLOOD FOR TEL AVIV' 🩸🚫🇮🇱 – PURE 'MERICA FIRST RAGE MODE ACTIVATED 🇺🇸😡‼️
